page_content:
Prerequisite: LING240 or LING200.

LING499 Directed Studies in Linguistics (1-3 Credits)

Independent study or research on language under the supervision of a faculty member.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Linguistics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

LING610 Syntactic Theory (3 Credits) Intensive introduction to transformational syntax. Prerequisite: LING31 2.
